summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of DERIS major revision (10+ new features). All critical flows pass: theme toggle/persistence, nav (no Contact, +Join the Story), logo marquee (5 logos), Our Services (4 packages), Kata Mereka reviews + Bagikan→/story CTA, Products (no prices, Bahan list, +Lanyard, +Harrington/Coach/Windbreaker), 4 visual size charts with zoom modal, About foto-utama image + CountUp IntersectionObserver animation (6+/500+/15k+/4.9), Designer 3-step flow (category→path→upload/editor) with 6 presets/8 fonts/align L-C-R, JoinStory (5 auto-rotating quotes, 5 stars, form, 6 featured reviews), Portfolio 6 items + Lightbox, all WA links use 6283123453430, /contact has no nav links. Zero console errors during navigation across all 7 routes.

issues: Phone number displayed as '08312345343' (11 digits) — full WA number is 6283123453430. Last digit appears truncated/cut in footer display. Verify constants.js phoneDisplay string.

Route is not defined in App.js so it renders the Layout shell with empty content (header+footer only) instead of a 404. Consider adding a catch-all route that redirects to / or shows NotFound. No internal links point to /contact, so impact is low.

action_items: (Minor) Footer phone display appears to drop last digit — verify BRAND.phoneDisplay in constants.js shows full 12-digit local number 083123453430.
(Minor) Add catch-all route in App.js (path='*') to handle /contact and other unknown paths with a redirect to / or a NotFound page (currently renders blank Layout).
critical_code_review_comments: Designer.jsx is 442 lines — borderline. Consider splitting CategorySelect / PathQuestion / UploadFlow / Editor / ApparelSVG into separate files for maintainability.
ThemeContext writes localStorage on every theme effect including initial mount; harmless but could be skipped on first render.
Designer 'back-to-path' testid is used by both UploadFlow and Editor — fine since they're never simultaneously mounted, just noting for future tests.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes; selectors are robust.
test_credentials: N/A — static React site, no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: theme toggle (data-testid=theme-toggle) persists via localStorage 'deris-theme'. Designer testids: cat-{jaket|kemeja|kaos}, path-{have|create}, preset-{hitam|putih|emas|maroon|navy|forest}, side-{front|back}-btn, new-text-input, add-text-btn, align-{left|center|right}, edit-font (8 options), edit-color, edit-size, delete-element-btn, send-design-btn, send-upload-wa. Story testids: quote-0..4 (5 quotes, ~4.5s rotation), star-1..5, story-{name|org|text|submit}, featured-review-0..5 (6 cards), upload-photo-input. Products: size-chart-btn (header help button) + size-chart-0..3 (4 actual charts), size-zoom (modal). Portfolio: portfolio-item-* + lightbox. CountUp on About requires scroll into viewport to trigger IntersectionObserver — works correctly when stats section reached. WA number across site: 6283123453430.
rca of the issue: No bugs requiring RCA. Two minor cosmetic findings only.
